titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Dolores Brandon Sound Recordings on Richard Foreman MSS.662
titlestmt.author: Rachel Searcy

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2026-05-13 17:13:51 UTC.

did.unittitle: Dolores Brandon Sound Recordings on Richard Foreman
did.abstract: Dolores Brandon is a poet, memoirist, essayist, radio producer and journalist whose work focuses on literary, visual, and performing arts. This collection consists of interview recordings of Dolores Brandon in conversation with Richard Foreman. The collection also includes interviews of Arnold Aronson and David Patrick Kelly discussing Foreman. Materials include two audiocassettes and one audio reel.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This collection consists of interview recordings of Dolores Brandon in conversation with Richard Foreman. The collection also includes interviews of Arnold Aronson and David Patrick Kelly discussing Foreman. Materials include two audiocassettes and one audio reel.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: This collection is protected by copyright and/or related rights. You are free to use materials in the collection in any way that is permitted by the copyright and related rights legislation that applies to your use. For other uses you need to obtain permission from the rights-holder(s).

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: Donated by Dolores Brandon in May 2026; the accession number associated with this gift is 2026.025.

phystech.head: Audiovisual Access Policies and Procedures
phystech.p: Audiovisual materials have not been preserved and may not be available to researchers. Materials not yet digitized will need to have access copies made before they can be used. To request an access copy, or if you are unsure if an item has been digitized, please contact NYU Special Collections (special.collections@nyu.edu, 212-998-2596) with the collection name, collection number, and a description of the item(s) requested. A staff member will respond to you with further information.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Identification of item, date; Dolores Brandon Sound Recordings of Richard Foreman; MSS 662; box number; folder number or item identifier; Fales Library and Special Collections, New York University.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: At the time of accessioning materials were rehoused in archival boxes, described at the collection-level, and inventoried at the item-level.

bioghist.head: Biographical Note
bioghist.p: Dolores Brandon is a poet, memoirist, essayist, radio producer and journalist whose work focuses on literary, visual, and performing arts.
